Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWCONTAS', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &CtaBanTip1 = nullvalue(&CtaBanTip1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTABANNOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &CtaBanTip2 = nullvalue(&CtaBanTip2) &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTABANNOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &CtaBanTip3 = nullvalue(&CtaBanTip3) &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTABANNOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &CtaBanSts = nullvalue(&CtaBanSts) Form.Caption = ' Cadastro de Contas Bancárias' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Clear() Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTABANNOM' &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(0, "Começa com") &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(1, "Contém") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTABANBANNOM' &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(0, "Começa com") &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(1, "Contém") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTABANFILCOD' &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(0, "<") &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(1, "=") &DynamicFiltersOperator1.AddItem(2, ">") EndCase If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Clear() Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTABANNOM' &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(0, "Começa com") &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(1, "Contém") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTABANBANNOM' &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(0, "Começa com") &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(1, "Contém") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTABANFILCOD' &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(0, "<") &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(1, "=") &DynamicFiltersOperator2.AddItem(2, ">") EndCase If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Clear() Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTABANNOM' &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(0, "Começa com") &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(1, "Contém") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTABANBANNOM' &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(0, "Começa com") &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(1, "Contém") Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTABANFILCOD' &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(0, "<") &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(1, "=") &DynamicFiltersOperator3.AddItem(2, ">") EndCase EndIf EndIf Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount CtaBanSts.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs hidden-sm' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &Update = !'' &Update.Link = Contas.Link(TrnMode.Update, EmpCod, CtabanCod) &Delete = !'' &Delete.Link = Contas.Link(TrnMode.Delete, EmpCod, CtabanCod) &EditarContasFuncionario = !'' Do Case Case CtaBanSts = Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO CtaBanSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs hidden-sm WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' Case CtaBanSts = Status_AtivoInativo.INATIVO CtaBanSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs hidden-sm WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Otherwise CtaBanSts.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs hidden-sm' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersOperator1.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersOperator2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersOperator3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &EditarContasFuncionario.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpContasFuncionario.PopUp(CtabanCod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInsert' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Contas.Call(TrnMode.Insert, nullvalue(EmpCod), nullvalue(CtabanCod)) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoMonitoraTalao' wwTalao.Link() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoAjuda' innewWindow.Target = 'https://ajuda.jaspi.com.br/index.aspx?1b66fb20-8956-4dc6-8f15-4431109a3b84' inNewWindow.Name = '_blank' innewWindow.OpenWindow() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoExport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate Excel spreadsheet and download it. Do 'LoadGridState' ExportWWContas.Call(&ExcelFilename, &ErrorMessage) If (&ExcelFilename <> "") Link(&ExcelFilename) Else msg(&ErrorMessage) Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CtaBanNom1.Visible = False &CtaBanBanNom1.Visible = False &CtaBanFilCod1.Visible = False &CtaBanTip1.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTABANNOM' &CtaBanNom1.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTABANBANNOM' &CtaBanBanNom1.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTABANFILCOD' &CtaBanFilCod1.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTABANTIP' &CtaBanTip1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CtaBanNom2.Visible = False &CtaBanBanNom2.Visible = False &CtaBanFilCod2.Visible = False &CtaBanTip2.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTABANNOM' &CtaBanNom2.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTABANBANNOM' &CtaBanBanNom2.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTABANFILCOD' &CtaBanFilCod2.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTABANTIP' &CtaBanTip2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CtaBanNom3.Visible = False &CtaBanBanNom3.Visible = False &CtaBanFilCod3.Visible = False &CtaBanTip3.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTABANNOM' &CtaBanNom3.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTABANBANNOM' &CtaBanBanNom3.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTABANFILCOD' &CtaBanFilCod3.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTABANTIP' &CtaBanTip3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTABANNOM' &DynamicFiltersOperator2 = 0 &CtaBanNom2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTABANNOM' &DynamicFiltersOperator3 = 0 &CtaBanNom3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CTABANCRT" &CtaBanCrt.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CTABANSTS" &CtaBanSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTABANNOM' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &CtaBanNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTABANBANNOM' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &CtaBanBanNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTABANFILCOD' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &CtaBanFilCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTABANTIP' &CtaBanTip1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CTABANCRT", "", not &CtaBanCrt.IsEmpty(), 0, &CtaBanCrt, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CTABANSTS", "", not &CtaBanSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &CtaBanSts, '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTABANNOM' AND not &CtaBanNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CtaBanNom1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator1 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTABANBANNOM' AND not &CtaBanBanNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CtaBanBanNom1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator1 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTABANFILCOD' AND not &CtaBanFilCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CtaBanFilCod1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator1 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CTABANTIP' AND not &CtaBanTip1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CtaBanTip1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTABANNOM' AND not &CtaBanNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CtaBanNom2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator2 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTABANBANNOM' AND not &CtaBanBanNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CtaBanBanNom2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator2 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTABANFILCOD' AND not &CtaBanFilCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CtaBanFilCod2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator2 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CTABANTIP' AND not &CtaBanTip2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CtaBanTip2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTABANNOM' AND not &CtaBanNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CtaBanNom3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator3 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTABANBANNOM' AND not &CtaBanBanNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CtaBanBanNom3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator3 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTABANFILCOD' AND not &CtaBanFilCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CtaBanFilCod3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator3 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CTABANTIP' AND not &CtaBanTip3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CtaBanTip3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Contas" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
